tables.description: This subject phenotypes data table includes subject gender; ethnicity; Patient Health Questionnaire (PHQ-9) total scores at baseline and quarterly during the first year of internship, n=5 variables; and Generalized Anxiety Disorder (GAD) total scores at baseline and quarterly during the first year of internship, n=5 variables.

variables.name: Age
variables.description: Age when medical internship started

variables.name: Ethnicity
variables.description: Ethnicity of participant

variables.name: GADtot0
variables.description: GAD-7 total score at baseline (before internship started)

variables.name: GADtot1
variables.description: GAD-7 total score at Quarter 1 of intern year

variables.name: GADtot2
variables.description: GAD-7 total score at Quarter 2 of intern year

variables.name: GADtot3
variables.description: GAD-7 total score at Quarter 3 of intern year

variables.name: GADtot4
variables.description: GAD-7 total score at Quarter 4 of intern year

variables.name: PHQtot0
variables.description: PHQ-9 total score at baseline (before internship started)

variables.name: PHQtot1
variables.description: PHQ-9 total score at Quarter 1 of intern year

variables.name: PHQtot2
variables.description: PHQ-9 total score at Quarter 2 of intern year

variables.name: PHQtot3
variables.description: PHQ-9 total score at Quarter 3 of intern year

variables.name: PHQtot4
variables.description: PHQ-9 total score at Quarter 4 of intern year

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: De-identified Subject ID

variables.name: Sex
variables.description: Gender of participant

variables.name: Year
variables.description: Medical intern cohort year

tables.description: This sample attributes table includes the body site where samples were collected, analyte type, tumor status, histological type of sample, and the sample genotyping center.

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte Type

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: GENOTYPING_CENTER
variables.description: Name of the center which conducted genotyping

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: De-identified Sample ID

tables.description: This subject consent data table contains subject IDs, consent group information, and case control status of subjects with respect to Patient Health Questionnaire (PHQ) evaluated depression.

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Case control status of the subject for PHQ depression (PHQ >=10) at baseline

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: De-identified Subject ID

tables.description: This subject sample mapping data table includes a mapping of study subject IDs to sample IDs. Samples are the final preps submitted for genotyping, sequencing, and/or expression data. For example, if one patient (subject ID) gave one sample, and that sample was processed differently to generate 2 sequencing runs, there would be two rows, both using the same subject ID, but having 2 unique sample IDs.

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID
